Metadata.title: Hadiah Link
Metadata.description: Find your next home — هدية لينك

nav.tagline: هدية لينك · Real estate & short stays · Syria

Footer.headline: Transparent fees · Manual payments · Admin oversight
Footer.body: No automatic host payouts. All listing and stay payments are traceable with references and optional proof URLs. Operators can override any state.
Footer.finePrint: Hadiah Link operates manual-first payments and admin-reviewed listings. Not a substitute for legal or financial advice.

Browse.emptyResultsTitle: No listings yet — be the first to post one 🎁
Browse.emptyResultsHint: Try clearing filters or expanding the search area.
Browse.emptyNoMatchHint: No exact match found. Try nearby areas or fewer filters.

Sybnb.title: SYBNB · Short stays
Sybnb.subtitle: Nightly places with host confirmation and manual-first payments. Card checkout stays off until legally enabled in your market.

home.title: Find a place that feels like home
home.subtitle: Hand-picked short stays with host confirmation. Pay safely — we surface trust signals, you confirm every detail.
home.urgency: {count, plural, =0 {Be among the first to list a stay — posting is free} one {Only {count} live stay right now — request to book early} other {{count} live stays — new guests joining daily}}
home.urgencySoftLaunch: Contact hosts directly while we scale — card checkout stays off in this phase.

home.emptyLatest: No stays yet — be the first to list yours. Posting is free.

trust.title: Why book on SYBNB
trust.phoneBody: Phone-verified accounts and clear listing review before the feed.
trust.reviewBody: Short-stay listings pass a SYBNB check — quality and fraud awareness.
trust.manualBody: No surprise card capture. You confirm how you pay, with references and proof when needed.
trust.syriaBody: Built for Syrian cities, neighborhoods, and how people really travel here.

listing.payWarning: Double-check every detail and price with the host before you pay or send money.
listing.requestSignedInButBlocked: This stay can’t be requested right now. Try again later or contact the owner on WhatsApp first.
listing.requestSignedInButBlockedNoPhone: This listing has no phone on file yet. You can still send a booking request so the owner can reply another way.
listing.paymentsOff: Card checkout is off — request the stay, then follow manual payment steps.
listing.ownerNote: This is your listing. Guests can request dates from the panel.
listing.toBook: to send a booking request for this stay.
listing.reportSectionHint: Choose a reason and submit — we escalate when reports add up.

host.title: Host dashboard
host.subtitle: Stays, requests, and trust — in one quiet place.
host.noListings: You have no short-stay listings yet. Post one from your main dashboard.
host.noRequests: No open requests. New requests appear here for your stays.
host.earningsPlaceholder: Settlements and host net amounts will appear after stays complete and admin confirms payouts.
host.verificationNone: Add a verified phone to unlock stronger trust on your host profile.
host.reportsWarning: {count, plural, =0 {No open guest reports} one {1 open report needs operator review} other {{count} open reports need operator review}}
host.reportsHint: Serious or repeated issues may limit bookings until resolved.

v1.noPaymentNote: No in-app payment yet — you only send a request. The host approves or declines; payment is arranged off-platform when you both agree.

errors.blocked: This stay can’t be requested right now.
errors.dates: Check your dates, nights, and guest count.
errors.own: You can’t book your own listing.

v1.forbidden: Sign in as the guest or host to view this request.
v1.manualNext: Host approved — arrange payment with them manually (in-app card payments are not enabled).
v1.confirmHint: When you and the guest are aligned (e.g. payment arranged), confirm to lock in the stay.
v1.lifecycleNote_review: This booking is in payment or review — keep communication on the platform.
v1.nextStep_guest_requested: Wait for the host to respond to your request.
v1.nextStep_host_approved: Confirm the stay when you and the guest are aligned.
v1.nextStep_guest_approved: Wait for the host to confirm the stay.
v1.nextStep_host_confirmed: After check-out, this trip is marked complete automatically the next day.
v1.nextStep_guest_confirmed: Enjoy your stay — after you check out, the trip will complete the next day.
v1.nextStep_host_pending: Complete any pending step (payment or review), then the host or system will advance the booking.
v1.nextStep_guest_pending: The booking may need a payment or review step — check messages and try again later.
v1.nextStep_done: This stay is complete and counts on your host record.
v1.nextStep_generic: View status above for the latest on this stay.

booking.title: Stay booking
booking.forbidden: You do not have access to this trip.
booking.notStay: This page is for short-stay bookings only.

Sell.needLoginBody: Sign in to submit a listing for admin review.
Sell.title: Sell or list a stay
Sell.feeIntro: Submit details and image URLs. A listing fee of {listingFee} applies (manual transfer + reference). Optional featured boost: {featuredFee}.
Sell.fieldTitleEnHint: Shown when the visitor uses English; falls back to Arabic if empty.
Sell.fieldIsDirectHint: On by default. Uncheck if you are a broker or posting for someone else.
Sell.featuredCheckbox: Request featured placement (additional fee, pending admin verification)
Sell.manualBoxBody: Add a transfer reference now or leave blank and pay offline. Admin verifies before go-live.
Sell.fieldPaymentMethodHint: Manual transfer is the default in Syria operations; cash or local gateway may apply when your team enables them.
Sell.locationSectionHint: Pick city and optional district, drop a pin for approximate location, and add a landmark note — exact street addressing is often unreliable.
Sell.placeholderAddressLandmark: e.g. near Al-Akram mosque, main square…
Sell.mapPinHint: Click the map to place the pin. Drag the marker to adjust. Location is indicative, not a formal address.
Sell.mapRequired: Drop a pin on the map so buyers can find your listing approximately — exact street addresses are not required.

Listing.shareWhatsAppBody:
See this listing on Hadiah Link 🎁
{url}
Listing.bnhubCommission: Platform commission on gross: {rate}%. Host payout is the remainder — released only after admin approval (no auto payouts).
Listing.signInSuffix: as a guest to request dates.
Listing.ownerNote: You own this listing. Guests will book here.
Listing.trustNotice: Hadiah Link may review listings for quality and fraud signals before and after publication. This badge indicates the listing has passed operational review — not a legal warranty.
Listing.openApproximateMap: Open approximate location in Google Maps
Listing.approximateLocationNote: Exact coordinates were not pinned — rely on city, district, and landmark notes above.
Listing.approximateLocationMapHint: Shown with a slight offset for privacy — not an exact rooftop position.
Listing.sybnbNightlyHint: Nightly rate in SYP — request a stay; payment stays manual unless the product enables card checkout in your market.
Listing.sybnbQuoteInvalidDates: Choose a valid check-in and check-out (checkout after check-in).
Listing.sybnbQuoteError: Could not load a quote for this listing.
Listing.sybnbRequestSubtitle: Host will confirm. Platform fee {rate}% (same as short-stay) applies when the booking is confirmed and paid out.
Listing.sybnbPaymentsOffNotice: Card payments (Stripe) are off by default. Use manual transfer and proof fields if you have agreed offline payment.
Listing.sybnbManualHint: Optional: reference and proof for manual settlement — not live card capture.
Listing.sybnbReviewPendingHint: This short-stay listing is not bookable in search until an operator approves it.
Listing.sybnbReviewRejectedHint: This listing did not pass operator review for SYBNB. You can still contact the host for other arrangements.
Listing.sybnbSupplyPausedTitle: This host is temporarily not accepting new short-stay requests.
Listing.priceHint: Confirm details with the owner before you transact off-platform.
Listing.hostHint: Contact happens according to your arrangement. Hadiah Link does not guarantee response times.
Listing.contactHint: Use the details on this page to reach the owner. Hadiah Link does not relay messages on your behalf.
Listing.contactUrgency: Call now before someone else does.
Listing.qrError: Could not create the QR code
Listing.afterPostShareTitle: Share your listing now to get more views
Listing.afterPostShareReferral: Invite friends to post their listings too
Listing.contactWhatsappCallHint: Use WhatsApp or phone to agree on details. Hadiah Link does not process payments between you and the owner.
Listing.contactNoPhone: The owner has not added a phone number yet — check back later.
Listing.postContactUpgradeHint: For more leads, try a Featured plan when you list.
Listing.revNudgeDirectFree: Your ad is no-middleman — upgrade to get more leads.
Listing.revNudgeViews: Your listing is getting views — upgrade it now.
Listing.revSocialProof: Many no-middleman listings get picked up fast.
Listing.whatsappCtaSub: Opens WhatsApp with a short message and this page link — you choose the contact.
Listing.bnhubDisabledShort: Short stays are disabled for this deployment.
Listing.makeFeaturedSubtitle: Reach more buyers with a featured placement (arranged with our team — no card payment on this page).
Listing.makeFeaturedValueHeadline: Get more views and calls by promoting your listing
Listing.makeFeaturedM1Headline: Your listing will not stay at the top without Featured
Listing.makeFeaturedM1Benefit1: Appears at the top of results
Listing.makeFeaturedUrgency: Limited free promotion for first listings
Listing.makeFeaturedPriceNote: Approximate — confirm with our team on WhatsApp
Listing.f1PriceLadderHint: This listing is already getting views — promotion is priced higher.
Listing.makeFeaturedNoRisk: No risk — you pay only once
Listing.makeFeaturedReinforcement: Most users get more calls after promotion
Listing.makeFeaturedBody: To feature this listing, contact us on WhatsApp or phone. We will confirm payment and set your listing to featured in the system.
Listing.makeFeaturedNoAdminPhone: Admin phone is not configured yet. Ask your operator to set HADIAH_MONETIZATION_PHONE.
Listing.makeFeaturedLoginRequired: Sign in with the account that owns this listing to request featured placement.
Listing.f1PaymentPendingHint: We will upgrade your listing after the team confirms your transfer on WhatsApp.
Listing.makeFeaturedActiveFeatured: This listing is featured and ranks higher in browse results.
Listing.makeFeaturedActiveLuxury: This listing uses a premium boost.
Listing.makeFeaturedActiveHint: To change or renew placement, contact our team the same way as for new upgrades.
Listing.bakaValue1: Your listing appears at the top
Listing.bakaReinforcement: Most users get more calls after promotion
Listing.bakaStep2: Step 2: Send payment proof on WhatsApp
Listing.bakaReassure2: Activation after we confirm with you
Listing.bakaMarkProofSent: I sent my proof on WhatsApp
Listing.availabilityOwnerHint: Tap to mark a night as booked or free. Guests see this as a simple guide — not a live booking system.
Listing.adStudioBlurb: Preview a simple promo layout and share on WhatsApp.

AdStudio.title: Ad studio
AdStudio.subtitle: Pick a template, preview with your photos and copy, then save and share.
AdStudio.saveSuccessSubtitle: Share your listing now to get more attention.
AdStudio.disclaimer: Preview is for your sharing convenience. Always confirm price and details with interested parties.

AdminAi.title: AI insights
AdminAi.subtitle: Heuristic listing health — not autonomous decisions.
AdminAi.recMorePhotos: Prompt sellers to add 1–3 clear photos; improves trust and browse CTR.
AdminAi.recAmenities: Nudge users to select real amenities (electricity, water, furnished) — never invent on their behalf.
AdminAi.recTitle: Encourage specific titles: city + property type + one hook.
AdminAi.recQuickPost: Point active posters to /quick-post and the in-form “Improve my listing” helper.

AdminSupplyGrowth.g2Name: Order G2 — Real users sprint (7 days)
AdminSupplyGrowth.g2Preamble: Seeding, DMs, group posts, after-post share on quick post, and human follow-up. Ops targets below align with the G2 runbook.
AdminSupplyGrowth.fastRepliesBody: Reply to every WhatsApp message quickly. Be helpful and human; that converts outreach into conversations and deals.
AdminSupplyGrowth.title: Supply growth engine
AdminSupplyGrowth.goal: 100+ live listings in 7–10 days — execution playbook (not auto-pilot).
AdminSupplyGrowth.g2Acceptance: G2 acceptance: aim for 50–100 listings in a week, daily back-and-forth, first real interest or payment — track honestly in a sheet.
AdminSupplyGrowth.principle: You don’t wait for listings. You create them. Outreach > code.
AdminSupplyGrowth.tileDesc: Seeding, DMs, group posts — get listings fast.
AdminSupplyGrowth.ch1Body: Add 20–30 listings yourself. Sources: Facebook Marketplace, Facebook groups, WhatsApp groups. Use Quick post for each.
AdminSupplyGrowth.ch2Body: Facebook posts, property comments, groups. ~20 DMs per day. Copy the Arabic message below — paste and send.
AdminSupplyGrowth.ch3Body: If they say yes: you create the listing, send them the link. They share and bring traffic.
AdminSupplyGrowth.ch4Body: Post daily in 2–3 groups. Use the template below. Your public site URL is inserted automatically when set in env.
AdminSupplyGrowth.outreachDmAr:
مرحباً، قمت بإنشاء منصة لنشر العقارات في سوريا 🎁
يمكنني نشر إعلانك مجاناً وزيادة عدد المهتمين
هل ترغب أن أضيفه لك؟
AdminSupplyGrowth.productTitle: What the product already does for you
AdminSupplyGrowth.productHome: Homepage shows a live “🔥 count” of published listings — social proof.
AdminSupplyGrowth.productPost: After quick post, success screen highlights sharing with a large WhatsApp button.
AdminSupplyGrowth.loopBody: People browse → open listings → call → more owners post. The loop starts.
AdminSupplyGrowth.ruleBody: If you don’t message people, nothing happens. The code is only the venue.
AdminSupplyGrowth.reportL4: WhatsApp / share intent: ___ (from your sheet, or from analytics if configured)

SellMvp.title: Post a listing
SellMvp.subtitle: Short form — live after you submit. No login required: we create a light account from your phone so the listing can go live.
SellMvp.fieldPhoneHint: Shown as contact on your listing. International format is fine.
SellMvp.verifyStayBlocked: Stay listings require a verified seller account. Complete phone or identity verification, then try again.

SelfMarketing.reminderShare: Share your listing to get more views
SelfMarketing.g4ReshareTitle: Share your listing again to get more contacts
SelfMarketing.upsellFeatured: Your ad is getting views — upgrade for better results
SelfMarketing.improveQuality: Add photos and amenities to sell faster
SelfMarketing.g4WeakEngagementTitle: High views, few contacts — tighten the ad
SelfMarketing.g4WeakEngagementBody: Try a clearer title, a realistic price, 1–2 new photos, and “no broker / بدون وسيط” when you sell direct.

Login.title: Sign in
Login.subtitle: Email-only demo session (cookie). For admin access, use an email listed in SYRIA_ADMIN_EMAILS and tick staff admin.
Login.name: Display name (optional)
Login.staffAdminHint: Only honored if email is in SYRIA_ADMIN_EMAILS.

Dashboard.shellSubtitle: Listings, bookings, and payments you own or made.
Dashboard.listingsSubtitle: Title, city, price, status (Featured or Normal), and public page views. Short-stay (BNHUB) availability is on each listing when you are the owner.
Dashboard.listingsEmpty: No listings yet — be the first to post one 🎁
Dashboard.postShareTitle: Share your listing now to get more views
Dashboard.postShareBody: One tap — send Hadiah Link to friends or groups on WhatsApp. No ads, no automation.
Dashboard.postShareReferral: Invite friends to post their listings too
Dashboard.shareForViewsHint: Your listing needs shares to get more views
Dashboard.bookingsIntro: Guests: pay manually and share a reference. Host payout lines stay pending until an admin approves and marks paid — never automatic.
Dashboard.sybnbPayStubHint: No real charge — stub intent for when SYBNB card payments are enabled. Use once per open session.
Dashboard.sybnbPayStubError: Could not start checkout. Check login, listing approval, and env flags.
Dashboard.paymentsIntro: Listing fees and featured boosts appear here with manual references. Admin verifies before listings go live.

Admin.shellSubtitle: Listings, payments, bookings, payouts, and users — full override.
Admin.drbrainPredictiveLead: What might happen next — heuristic early warnings only.
Admin.drbrainTotalsHint: {attempts} attempts · {blocked} blocked signals · {apiish} audit rows matching error patterns (24h UTC)
Admin.drbrainMaintenanceDisclaimer: Runtime-only switches — redeploy or hosting env updates keep protection durable.
Admin.drbrainInvestorDemoRibbon: Demo data — simulated for investor presentation
Admin.drbrainStoryS1: Dr. Brain monitors the platform continuously.
Admin.drbrainStoryS2: It detects payment anomalies before damage spreads.
Admin.drbrainStoryS3: It blocks risky payment and payout flows using kill switches.
Admin.drbrainStoryS4: It creates maintenance tickets for the operations team.
Admin.drbrainStoryS5: Admins acknowledge and approve fixes manually — no silent automation.
Admin.drbrainStoryS6: Investor value: safer operations, lower fraud risk, higher trust.
Admin.drbrainStoryDemoHint: Advances locally only — no database writes or provider calls.
Admin.paymentsMonitorIntro: Aggregated counters and recent audit rows only — no secrets or raw payloads.
Admin.homeListingsDesc: Approve, reject, flag fraud, verify listing fees.
Admin.homeBookingsDesc: Validate guest payments, check-in, fraud flags.
Admin.homePayoutsDesc: Approve and mark paid — no auto transfer in this app.
Admin.homePaymentsDesc: All listing fee lines, methods, references, and manual verification.
Admin.homePromotionsDesc: Featured placements: zones, schedule, payment linkage.
Admin.homeGrowthDesc: Traffic, funnel, attribution, and revenue snapshots (30 days).
Admin.homeAutonomyDesc: Review safe recommendations — no auto messaging or auto pricing.
Admin.homeListingAssistantDesc: Paste authorized text; auto-format fields for Hadiah Link (no illegal scraping).
Admin.listingsIntro: Verify listing fees before publishing. Featured unlocks after FEATURED payment is verified.
Admin.bookingsIntro: Mark guest payments, record check-in, escalate fraud.
Admin.sybnbBookingsIntro: Stay category only — booking state, guest payment, and risk flags. Use manual clear after you have reviewed off-platform context.
Admin.sybnbReportsIntro: Guest reports grouped by listing. Review reasons, contact the seller, then mark reviewed or archive if needed.
Admin.payoutsIntro: Controlled release — approve then mark paid offline. Keep AUTO_PAYOUT_ENABLED false so no automated disbursement runs from this app.
Admin.usersIntro: Adjust roles for operations — admin override always available.
Admin.paymentsIntro: Approve manual transfers and reconcile references before listings go live.
Admin.promotionsIntro: Paid visibility zones tied to verified listing payments where applicable.
Admin.growthIntro: Rolling {days}-day snapshot. Server and client events — not a full BI stack.
Admin.growthRevVerifiedNote: Verified listing payments may be broken out per currency below.
Admin.g4SectionIntro: Use these numbers in your stand-up. Copy the one-line log into a simple sheet. Everything is from live listing data; lead taps are recorded per request after this deploy.
Admin.g4LogLineLabel: One-line log (copy into your running sheet)
Admin.g4LeadEventsNote: WhatsApp and phone taps are counted as growth events (lead_whatsapp, lead_phone) for daily totals. Historical days before that change show 0 in these two columns.
Admin.g4TopCategory: Top category to double down (WhatsApp taps)
Admin.g4TopCategoryBody: {name} — {n} total WhatsApp taps (published listings, all time). Add more stock and outreach here.
Admin.g4TopCityBody: {city} — score {score} (sum of page views + WhatsApp + phone on published listings). Post more and DM locally.
Admin.g4TargetsTitle: Program targets (cumulative new published listings by week of launch — you track the week label)
Admin.g4WeakTitle: Weak listings to fix (10+ views, under 2 lead taps)
Admin.g4WeakEmpty: No listings in this window — good.
Admin.g4WeakHint: Fix: clearer title, realistic price, 1–2 more photos, and turn on “no broker / بدون وسيط” when true.
Admin.g4Principles: No paid ads, no SEO automation: win with fresh listings, WhatsApp replies, and owner sharing. One focused channel beats scattered experiments.
Admin.g5SectionIntro: Pick winners from WhatsApp totals, flood supply there for 48h, then expand only after traction. No paid ads required.
Admin.g5WinnersTitle: Today’s winners (from stats — highest WhatsApp taps, all-time on published listings)
Admin.g5Checklist48h: Next 48h: add 10–15 new listings in the top city, only in the top category (same vertical).
Admin.g5Outreach: Outreach: message sellers and groups only in that city + category — ignore the rest until this pocket wins.
Admin.g5LocalConversion: In that city: keep many listings on “no broker / بدون وسيط”, realistic prices, and short clear titles.
Admin.g5StatListings: Published listings in this city: {n} (aim for {min}+ before expanding)
Admin.g5StatDirect: “No broker” share: about {pct}% of listings in this city
Admin.g5ExpandYes: Traction target met for this city (enough listings + daily WhatsApp activity). Plan the next city.
Admin.g5ExpandNotYet: Stay focused: grow listings and daily taps in this city before opening a new front.
Admin.g5Footnote: Homepage shows a hot-city strip to visitors when the winning city has at least one WhatsApp tap.
Admin.playbook7Subtitle: Run this alongside the Stats / G4 / G5 blocks on this page — about 30–60 minutes per day when you are active.
Admin.playbookT3: +5–10 real WhatsApp conversations (replies that move forward)
Admin.playbookR1Body: From the Stats tab and the blocks on this page, write down:
Admin.playbookR1a: Top city (highest WhatsApp taps on listings) — G5 + G4 on this page.
Admin.playbookR1b: Top category (highest WhatsApp taps) — G4 on this page.
Admin.playbookR1c: Hot supply: {n} published listings with ≥ 10 views right now (proxy for who to pitch).
Admin.playbookR2Body: For each hot listing: 10–24 views → 70k / 150k; 25+ views → 90k / 180k (server enforces caps). Optional owner DM — copy/paste (Arabic):
Admin.playbookR2Template:
إعلانك يحصل على مشاهدات 🔥
ترقيته الآن يعطيك اتصالات أكثر
هل تريد تفعيله؟
Admin.playbookR3Body: Add 5–10 listings in the top city and top category. Fix weak ones: clearer title, realistic price, 1–2 photos, «no broker / بدون وسيط» when true (see the weak list in G4).
Admin.playbookR4Template:
مرحباً، قمت بإنشاء منصة لنشر العقارات في سوريا 🎁
يمكنني نشر إعلانك مجاناً وزيادة عدد المهتمين
هل ترغب أن أضيفه لك؟
Admin.playbookR5Body: For low-view owners, nudge: share the listing on WhatsApp to lift views. (Copy for Arabic users: شارك إعلانك الآن عبر واتساب لزيادة المشاهدات — also surfaced in the owner dashboard.)
Admin.playbookWeeklyA: A) If higher ladder prices still convert similarly, consider raising F1 baselines: FEATURED +10–20k, PREMIUM +20–30k (update config with care — this page does not change prices).
Admin.playbookWeeklyB: B) One city: keep filling until you reach about {n}+ live listings in that city before you split focus.
Admin.playbookReportTitle: What to report back (daily or every 2 days)
Admin.playbookReportHint: Copy the snapshot below (numbers refresh when you load this page), then add «messages sent» manually from your own tracking.
Admin.autonomyIntro: Assist and safe autopilot modes only suggest actions. Nothing is auto-sent to users externally; pricing and payouts are never applied automatically.
Admin.autonomyPreviewHint: GET /api/admin/autonomy/preview?propertyId=… returns a dry-run JSON for admins.
Admin.autonomyGenerateTitle: Generate / refresh recommendations for a listing
Admin.listingAssistantIntro: Paste text you have permission to use (your photos, owner-authorized copy, or manually retyped from other platforms). This tool formats and guesses fields — you always confirm on the publish form.
Admin.listingAssistantLegal: Do not scrape or copy content without rights. Facebook and other networks prohibit unauthorized automation; we never fetch posts for you. Paste only what you can legally publish.
Admin.listingAssistantDailyBody:
MORNING (2–3h)
1) Add listings — target 20–30/day (Facebook groups, Marketplace, Telegram): copy → clean → post on Hadiah Link.
2) Contact brokers — target 20 messages/day.

AFTERNOON (2h)
3) Content — 2–3 short videos (property / price / areas); reuse on Instagram.

EVENING (1h)
4) Engage — reply to all messages, follow up brokers, spot-check listings.

TRACK: listings added · brokers contacted · replies · videos · traffic. If listings < 20, prioritise listings tomorrow.
Admin.listingAssistantImagesLabel: Extra image URLs (optional, one per line)
Admin.listingAssistantFbHint: We do not download the post. Keep the tab open, copy visible text and image links yourself.
Admin.listingAssistantMapHint: Map pin and payment steps are still required on the sell form — coordinates are not guessed here.
Admin.f1RequestsIntro: Owners pay outside the app; match WhatsApp proof to request ID, then confirm. Repeating confirm does not double-count.
Admin.f1M2SectionIntro: Copy, paste, then confirm the payment in the table below. Listings are upgraded on confirm (plan + featured window).
Admin.f1M2FollowupHint: Use the Follow-up filter for pending requests older than 12h.
Admin.f1M2DailyLogHint: Log these numbers in your sheet each day: requests, payments, revenue. Times are server-local day.
Admin.statsIntro: Money, listings, and engagement at a glance. Server-cached; refresh the page to update.
Admin.statsMoneyFootnote: Source: payment requests with status “confirmed” (manual settlement).
Admin.statsF1AbIntro: Bucket 0: 50k/120k SYP — bucket 1: 70k/150k. Conversion = confirmed ÷ requests.
Admin.statsF1TierIntro: Tier 0: under 10 views (50k/120k) — tier 1: 10–24 views (70k/150k) — tier 2: 25+ views (90k/180k), capped at 100k/200k. Conversion = confirmed ÷ requests.
Admin.statsF1WeeklyRule: Weekly rule: if bucket 1 conversion ≥ 80% of bucket 0, roll out higher prices: SYRIA_F1_PRICING_MODE=high. Use low for the lower tier, ab to keep a 50/50 test.
Admin.statsF1LadderFootnote: Amount on each request is set from the listing’s public view count at request time. Caps: featured 100k SYP, premium 200k SYP.
Admin.statsF1DecisionYes: Signal: higher price tier looks safe to make default (per rule).
Admin.statsF1DecisionNo: Signal: keep A/B or lower pricing until more volume.
Admin.statsActivityFootnote: “Expired boost” = published listing whose featured end date is in the past. Archive = archived status.
Admin.statsEngagementFootnote: Sums of counters on all property rows (not per-day in this table).
Admin.statsChartBlurb: Max single-day views in this window: {max}
Admin.statsChartHintViews: Each bar is a UTC calendar day, counting public listing views recorded as events.

sell.title: Post a property
sell.subtitle: Arabic fields are required; English is optional.

InvestorDemo.title: SYBNB Investor Demo
InvestorDemo.lead: Polished, isolated preview of short-stay supply, trust, and ops — all demo data only (no LECIPM, no real cards).
InvestorDemo.s1b: Browse the SYBNB feed: operator-approved listings only; paused hosts and fraud flags stay out of the happy path.
InvestorDemo.s2b: Hosts complete phone/identity steps before supply reaches guests; this hub never surfaces internal fraud scores in guest copy.
InvestorDemo.s3b: Request → host decision → (stub) payment — always policy-gated.
InvestorDemo.s4b: Stub intents and production lock keep charges off until product + legal sign-off.
InvestorDemo.s5b: Listings, stays, and payouts are reviewable in admin surfaces — demo rows are prefixed and removable.
InvestorDemo.s6b: The metrics panel below is simulated or limited to demo records — not production analytics.
